interpretationNote: User locked beta = parameter shocks (Q2 of /babysitter:babysit interview, 2026-04-06). Alpha = historical-scenario replay is OUT OF SCOPE for this slice. The existing alpha infrastructure (BacktestingService.compareScenarios + runScenarioComparisons) was found to be a post-hoc ratio scaling rather than a real per-scenario MC run -- recorded as a finding only, NOT in scope to fix here.

design.scenarioSource: predefined-in-contract (SUPPORTED_STRESS_SCENARIOS const, parallel to SUPPORTED_VARIABLES + SUPPORTED_METRICS)
design.scenarioOverridesShape: Each scenario bundles 1..3 (variableId, value) overrides applied to a single base config via the same scalar-only applyOverride pattern as one-way/two-way
design.engineLifecycle: sync (deterministic, in-process) -- mirrors one-way/two-way, NOT the async BacktestingService pipeline

newContractTypes: StressScenarioSchema (in sensitivity-variables-v1.ts) -- { id, label, description, overrides: array }
StressAnalysisDatapointSchema (in sensitivity-run-v1.contract.ts) -- { scenarioId, scenarioLabel, metricValue, baselineDelta }
StressAnalysisSummarySchema (in sensitivity-run-v1.contract.ts) -- { worstCase, bestCase, range, worstScenarioId, bestScenarioId }
StressAnalysisResultV1Schema (in sensitivity-run-v1.contract.ts) -- { scenarioIds, metricId, baselineValue, datapoints, summary, computedAt }
engineReuses: applyOverride pattern (called N times per scenario for multi-override application)
backend.newRouteHandler: POST /api/funds/:id/sensitivity/stress (added to server/routes/sensitivity.ts, NOT a new file)
backend.serviceChanges: none (sensitivityRunService is already kind-aware via the 'stress' enum value -- already in CHECK constraint since Phase 0)

frontend.vizApproach: List-style scenario rows: scenario label + description + computed metric value + a delta-bar showing baselineDelta sign and magnitude (red for negative, emerald for positive). NOT a chart -- HTML/CSS only. Sorted by scenarioId order from SUPPORTED_STRESS_SCENARIOS for stable rendering.
frontend.pageWiring: client/src/pages/sensitivity-analysis.tsx -- remove 'stress' from COMING_SOON_TABS (which becomes empty array), add a TabsContent block for value='stress', mount StressPanel

gateTextRemoval.currentText: Monte Carlo backtesting, one-way parameter sensitivity, and two-way parameter sensitivity are live. Stress-testing remains intentionally disabled until it has a fund-scoped backend endpoint, a stable comparison contract, and persisted scenario data behind it.
gateTextRemoval.newText: Sensitivity analysis surface: Monte Carlo backtesting, one-way and two-way parameter sweeps, and named stress scenarios -- all fund-scoped and persisted.

perTabLiveNowCardsRemoval.rationale: Each of the 3 currently-live tabs has a 'Live now' Card with a description. After 4 live tabs the redundancy is significant. Drop them all in IA cleanup.
affectedTabs: stress (do NOT add a Live now card on stress in the first place)

backend: tests/unit/services/stress-test-engine.test.ts (NEW: baseline, scenario application correctness, multi-override semantics, baselineDelta sign, summary worst/best/range, error paths for unknown scenarioIds, NO_PUBLISHED_CONFIG path, SensitivityEngineError instanceof check)

tests/unit/routes/sensitivity-routes.test.ts (EXTEND: add stress happy-path, validation failure for unknown scenarioIds, validation failure for empty scenarios array, kind dispatch for service createPending with kind='stress', error mapping reuses STATUS_BY_CODE)
frontend: tests/unit/hooks/useSensitivityRuns.test.tsx (EXTEND: add useStressRun cases mirroring useOneWayRun + useTwoWayRun)

tests/unit/components/sensitivity/StressPanel.test.tsx (NEW: idle, loading, error, results states; multi-select scenario picker; default scenario selection; results render delta-bar with sign-aware coloring; uses installRadixSelectShim)
tests/unit/pages/sensitivity-analysis.test.tsx (EXTEND: stress tab is NOT disabled, mounts StressPanel, normalized tab labels, new gate text, no Live now cards)
tests/unit/components/layout/navigation.test.tsx OR navigation-config.test.ts (EXTEND or NEW: sidebar label is 'Sensitivity Analysis', not 'Backtesting')

constraints.noAlphaInfrastructureFix: post-hoc scaling smell in runScenarioComparisons is recorded as a finding only, do NOT fix in this slice
constraints.stressKindEnumAlreadySupported: sensitivity_runs CHECK constraint already includes 'stress', no migration needed

outOfScope: Alpha (historical scenario) interpretation -- explicitly rejected by user in Q2
Custom scenario builder UI (only predefined SUPPORTED_STRESS_SCENARIOS for v1)
Fix for runScenarioComparisons post-hoc scaling smell (recorded as finding, not fixed)
Async/queued lifecycle for stress (sync only -- different from BacktestingWorkspace)
REFL-034 documenting the alpha-infrastructure smell (user did not pick option 4 in Q1)

alphaFinding.summary: runScenarioComparisons in backtesting-service.ts exists but does NOT pass marketParams to unifiedMonteCarloService.runSimulation. Instead it runs the default simulation and applies post-hoc ratio scaling via applyMarketAdjustment. This is a fixed-function approximation, not a real per-scenario MC run.
alphaFinding.actionRequired: FIXED in Phase 2 (.planning/phases/02-backtesting-scenario-comparison-rewrite-p1) -- runScenarioComparisons now injects scenario-specific marketParameters per scenario via Plan 02-03, applyMarketAdjustment is deleted, and a Phoenix truth case under tests/unit/truth-cases/ validates the rewrite end-to-end. See docs/plans/2026-04-XX-backtesting-scenario-comparison-rewrite.md for the before/after comparison.
